title: prunus lusitanica subsp. lusitanica
intro: Prunus lusitanica subsp. lusitanica, also known as Portuguese laurel or cherry laurel, is a flowering evergreen shrub native to the western Mediterranean region. The plant's leaves and bark possess medicinal properties, particularly in their capacity to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits associated with Prunus lusitanica subsp. lusitanica include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and serve as a natural treatment for various skin conditions. Herbal preparations often involve infusions of the plant's leaves in hot water or the use of its berries in various remedies.
